clue: See, catching tan on head and upper body?
explanation: TAN on head is NAT. SEE catching NAT gives SENATE. A SENATE is an upper (legislative) body.
hints: "On head", in this clue, is a reversal indicator.
The definition is "upper body?", and the question mark indicates some playfulness.
"Catching" tells you that one part of the wordplay contains (has caught) another.
